name: HNMS Nautilus (M 12)
events: 7 Mar 1940 Around 0800 hours, HrMs O 21 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. van Dulm, RNN) departed Flushing for Den Helder where she arrived around 1740 hours. She was joined shortly after 1600 hours by HrMs Nautilus (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Gauw, RNN) which then escorted her in.
[Time kept in the Netherlands at this time was GMT + 20 minutes.] (1)
